creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Johannes Jost Meixner from comment #3)

Yes, exactly the same thing, no change. Installed packages:
firefox-38.0.1,1
linux-c6-flashplugin-11.2r202.460

The Adobe page on http://www.adobe.com/software/flash/about/ confirms the version number, but, as described in an earlier comment, the bouncing cube object dies whereas the static text ist displayed, indicating "You have version 11,2,202,460 installed"
